title: Skunk - Remastered
description: This mod adds tamable skunks to the game.
body:
This mod is a reworked version of the Wildlife Expanded: Skunk mod that adds skunks to the game!



 
<details>
<summary>About the skunk</summary>
  
-sweet berry bush won't hurt it
  
-breedable with carrots

-tamable with sweet berries, if already tamed then it will only heal it

-can be tempted with sweet berries or with the Skunk Commanding Stick (if tamed)

-panics when attacked and sprays at the attacker

-child skunk will follow its parent

-glowing eyes in the dark

-can be put on the shoulders

-scares mobs away when on the shoulder except undeads and the other tamed mobs of the player

-It will drop off from your shoulders when you shift + right click the ground

-can remove the spray ability on tamed skunks if a shear is used on it (it wont panic then when attacked)

-can regain the spray ability on tamed skunks if glow berries are used on it

-can dance if a jukebox is played nearby


-when tamed you can change its behaviour with the Skunk Commanding Stick (made with sweet berries and a stick)

-follows owner if in follow mode

-wanders around if in wander mode

-sits down if in rest mode  

</details>





<details>
<summary>Many built-in variants for the skunk</summary>

-hooded (forest)
  
-striped (forest)

-vanilla (forest)

-albino (snowy taiga)

</details>


 



<details>
<summary>Skunk Armor</summary>

-leather

-iron

-golden

-diamond

armor are available too for the skunks
</details>


 



<details>
<summary>spawn settings json files</summary>

-forge: can be found in data/forge/biome_modifier for every variant

-fabric: has no spawn settings json files, instead it uses a config file that can be found in the config folder

</details>


 


<details>
<summary>item tags json files too for</summary>

-breed items

-tame items

-tempt items

-tamed tempt items

-weapon items (that it can equip like swords)

-can spray again items (items that lets it regain the spray ability if sheared)

</details>


 

Suggested by oakuskunk

Artist Tenchigon
